# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.

Prevent memcached exposed port.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: production
  labels:
    environment: production
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-application
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: web-application
    tier: frontend
    environment: production
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-application
      tier: frontend
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-application
        tier: frontend
        environment: production
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: web-application
          image: web-application:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
              value: "memcached-service.production.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
              value: "11211"
            - name: ENVIRONMENT
              value: "production"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
      restartPolicy: Always
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
    environment: production
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
      tier: cache
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
        tier: cache
        environment: production
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: memcached
          image: memcached:1.6-alpine
          args:
            - "-l"
            - "0.0.0.0"
            - "-m"
            - "256"
            - "-c"
            - "1024"
            - "-t"
            - "4"
          ports:
            - containerPort: 11211
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "300Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 11211
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 11211
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
          securityContext:
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 11211
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
      restartPolicy: Always
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: background-workers
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: background-workers
    tier: worker
    environment: production
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: background-workers
      tier: worker
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: background-workers
        tier: worker
        environment: production
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: background-worker
          image: background-worker:latest
          env:
            - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
              value: "memcached-service.production.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
              value: "11211"
            - name: ENVIRONMENT
              value: "production"
            - name: WORKER_CONCURRENCY
              value: "4"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - "pgrep -f worker"
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - "pgrep -f worker"
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
      restartPolicy: Always
---
# ClusterIP service for Memcached - only accessible within the cluster
# No external exposure - prevents memcached from being accessed outside the cluster
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
    environment: production
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  clusterIP: None
  selector:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
  ports:
    - name: memcached
      port: 11211
      targetPort: 11211
      protocol: TCP
---
# Service for web application - internal ClusterIP, use an Ingress for external access
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: web-application-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: web-application
    tier: frontend
    environment: production
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: web-application
    tier: frontend
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
---
# NetworkPolicy to restrict Memcached access only to web-application and background-workers
# This prevents any other pods or external traffic from reaching Memcached
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: memcached-access-policy
  namespace: production
  labels:
    environment: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
      tier: cache
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: web-application
              tier: frontend
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: background-workers
              tier: worker
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 11211
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: memcached
              tier: cache
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 11211
    # Allow DNS resolution
    - to: []
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
---
# NetworkPolicy to deny all external ingress to the namespace by default
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-external-to-memcached
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: production
